name: Sword Snap
short_description: Test your reflexes in this fast-paced duel between Tanuki, the nimble raccoon, and Toad, the samurai toad. Strike first when the exclamation mark appears to earn a point. With simple yet exciting gameplay, focus on speed and timing to outsmart your opponent and rack up points in each duel!
detailed_description: Prepare to put your reflexes to the ultimate test in this fast-paced duel between Tanuki, the nimble raccoon, and Toad, the formidable samurai toad. In a single, intense scene, your goal is simple but challenging—when the exclamation mark appears, be the first to strike! A swift attack earns you a point, so stay sharp and focused. With straightforward yet captivating gameplay, this game keeps you on your toes as you strive to outsmart your opponent and rack up points. Perfect for quick gaming sessions, it's all about timing, speed, and precision. Do you have what it takes to master the art of the duel and prove your reflexes are the sharpest?
